Package org.eventb.internal.ui.eventbeditor.elementdesc

Class AbstractEditComposite

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.ui.eventbeditor.elementdesc.AbstractEditComposite
All Implemented Interfaces:
IEditComposite
Direct Known Subclasses:
CComboEditComposite, TextEditComposite, ToggleEditComposite
public abstract class AbstractEditComposite extends Object implements IEditComposite

  • Constructor Details

    • AbstractEditComposite

      public AbstractEditComposite(AttributeDesc attrDesc)
      Constructor. No actual widgets are created at the moment. Client has to call createComposite(IEventBEditor, FormToolkit, Composite) to create the widgets themselves.
      Parameters:
      attrDesc - a UI description for an attribute.

  • Method Details

    • setForm

      public void setForm(org.eclipse.ui.forms.widgets.ScrolledForm form)
      Description copied from interface: IEditComposite
      Set the scrolled form of the main edit page. This should be called after the constructor for any class implements this interface.
      Specified by:
      setForm in interface IEditComposite
      Parameters:
      form - a scrolled form

    • refresh

      Refresh the information display within this edit composite.
      Specified by:
      refresh in interface IEditComposite

    • setElement

      public void setElement(IInternalElement element)
      Description copied from interface: IEditComposite
      Set the corresponding element for the edit composite. This should be call after the constructor of any class implements this interface.
      Specified by:
      setElement in interface IEditComposite
      Parameters:
      element - an attributed element

    • createComposite

      public void createComposite(IEventBEditor<?> editor, org.eclipse.ui.forms.widgets.FormToolkit tk, org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Composite parent)
      Description copied from interface: IEditComposite
      Create the actual widgets. This should be called after IEditComposite.setElement(IInternalElement) and IEditComposite.setForm(ScrolledForm) has been called.
      Specified by:
      createComposite in interface IEditComposite
      Parameters:
      editor - the Event-B Editor
      tk - the form toolkit used to create the widgets.
      parent - the composite parent of all the widgets.

    • initialise

      public abstract void initialise(boolean refreshMarker)

      public void setSelected(boolean selection)
      Description copied from interface: IEditComposite
      Select/Deselect the attribute.
      Specified by:
      setSelected in interface IEditComposite
      Parameters:
      selection - true to select. false to deselect.

    • getAttributeType

      public IAttributeType getAttributeType()
      Description copied from interface: IEditComposite
      Return the corresponding attribute type for this edit composite.
      Specified by:
      getAttributeType in interface IEditComposite
      Returns:
      the corresponding attribute type IAttributeType.

    • refresh

      public void refresh(Set<IAttributeType> set)
      Description copied from interface: IEditComposite
      Refresh the information display within this edit with the information that an attribute has been changed.
      Specified by:
      refresh in interface IEditComposite

    • setReadOnly

      public abstract void setReadOnly(boolean readOnly)
      Sets the read only state of this composite.

      After it has been called with true argument, the user is no more able to edit the composite contents.

      Conversely, after it has been called with false argument, the user is able to edit the composite contents.

      Parameters:
      readOnly - true to make the composite read only, false otherwise
